unsubscribe_modal.title: Unsubscribe from Advanced plan?
unsubscribe_modal.message_suffix: to learn more about these changes when you downgrade to the Free plan.

image_upload.action_hint: Accepts .jpeg and .png format. File must be smaller than {{maxSize}}MB. Resolution must be less than {{maxResolution}}MP.

banner.post_purchase_support_title: Add post-purchase widget to your theme
banner.post_purchase_support_message: Watch this quick 2-minute video to add the widget and activate them on your store.
banner.customer_account_support_title: Add customer account extension to your theme
banner.customer_account_support_message: Watch this quick 2-minute video to add the extensions and activate them on your store.
banner.request_post_purchase_title: Add the post-purchase widget to your Thank you page
banner.request_post_purchase_message: To add the widget to your Thank You page, go to Theme Customization and follow the steps mentioned in the User guide
banner.request_watermark_message: We can help you remove 'BLOOP Referral by BSS' watermark for free. Contact us to enjoy a cleaner interface
banner.request_watermark_chat: Hi, I'd like to request the removal of Bloop watermark!
banner.popup_v2_chat: Hey! I’m ready to switch to the new popup design. Can you help?
banner.popup_v2_message_line_1: We've enhanced our popup design to make the referral process quicker and easier for everyone. For you, the new design offers a seamless configuration process and easy customization to match your store's branding. Your customers will benefit from a streamlined referral process and effortless reward claims.
banner.popup_v2_message_line_2: Want to upgrade to the new design? Contact us via live chat or email support@bloop.plus. We're excited for you to experience the new design!
banner.referral_page_message: To set up referral page, please contact us for FREE guidance
banner.referral_page_chat: Hi, I'd love to create a referral page
